headline: GitOps
description: GitOps (Weaveworks, 2017) is an operational framework using Git as the single source of truth for declarative infrastructure and applications. Git commits trigger automated deployment. Tools: Argo CD, Flux CD. GitOps applies DevOps best practices (version control, code review, CI/CD) to infrastructure.

citation.name: GitOps: Cloud-Native Continuous Delivery Patterns (2025 Edition)
citation.author: multiple

citation.name: DevOps and Platform Engineering in 2025: A Systematic Review
